title: Velvety Portuguese Pilchards Bowl
description: A lush, midnight-craving bowl of Portuguese pilchards simmered with coconut milk and smoked paprika, finished with fresh herbs and served in a lacquerware bowl for a velvety, comforting experience.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add pilchards fillets and cook for 2 minutes on each side until lightly browned.
Pour in coconut milk and tomato puree, then stir in smoked paprika, oregano, sea salt, and black pepper.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes to meld flavors and soften the fish.
Remove lid, increase heat to medium, and let the sauce thicken to a silky consistency, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the pilchards and sauce to a lacquerware bowl, garnish with chopped fresh herbs, and serve immediately.
